products.name: Mangal Sutra
description: A beautiful traditional mangal sutra designed to symbolize love and commitment.
Crafted with elegant black beads and a stylish gold pendant.

products.name: Silver Ring
description: A stylish silver ring with a clean and modern design.
Crafted from high-quality sterling silver for durability.

products.name: Beaded Bracelet
description: A trendy bracelet made with stylish beads for a modern look.
Lightweight and comfortable for daily wear.

products.name: Gold Pendant
description: A beautiful gold pendant designed to add elegance to any outfit.
Crafted with a premium finish and timeless design.
